edit_recipient.description: Update the selected recipient name or phone number.

delete_recipients.title: Delete recipients
delete_recipients.description: Choose one or more recipients to remove.

entity_mapping.description: Optionally override the object_id values used to auto-detect ESPHome entities.

send_sms.name: Send SMS
send_sms.description: Send an SMS using the configured Q-Tronic SMS Gateway.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Leave empty if only one gateway is configured.

saved_recipients.name: Saved recipients
saved_recipients.description: Select one or more saved recipients configured in Q-Tronic SMS Gateway.

recipient.name: Manual recipient
recipient.description: Optional phone number in international format. Use this only for numbers not saved in the integration.

encoding.name: Encoding
encoding.description: Use auto, passthrough, transliterate, or ucs2.

call_to.name: Call To
call_to.description: Place one or more outbound calls using the configured Q-Tronic SMS Gateway.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Leave empty if only one gateway is configured.

saved_recipients.name: Saved recipients
saved_recipients.description: Select one or more saved recipients configured in Q-Tronic SMS Gateway.

recipient.name: Manual recipient
recipient.description: Optional phone number in international format. Use this only for numbers not saved in the integration.

ring_time_s.name: Ring time [s]
ring_time_s.description: How long the modem should keep dialing before it disconnects the call.

restart_required.title: Restart Home Assistant to finish updating Q-Tronic SMS Gateway
restart_required.description:
The Q-Tronic SMS Gateway add-on synchronized a new custom integration version (`{synced_version}`) into `/config/custom_components`, but Home Assistant is still running version `{current_version}`. Restart Home Assistant Core to load the updated integration and restore actions like `qtronic_sms_gateway.send_sms` / `qtronic_sms_gateway.call_to`.

Previous synced version: `{previous_version}`.
